Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client

Class Client

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.Client
All Implemented Interfaces:
InGameListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
RMIClient, SocketClient
public abstract class Client extends Object implements InGameListener
Abstract class representing a client in the network. Handles connection, communication, and heartbeat messages to the server.

  • Constructor Details

    • Client

      public Client(String ip, int port, View view)
      Constructs a new Client with the specified IP address, port, and view.
      Parameters:
      ip - the server IP address
      port - the server port
      view - the view associated with this client

      public void onGameStatusChanged(boolean idGame)
      Handles the game state change.
      Specified by:
      onGameStatusChanged in interface InGameListener
      Parameters:

    • startHeartbeat

      public void startHeartbeat()
      Starts the heartbeat thread to periodically send heartbeat messages to the server.

    • setInGame

      public void setInGame(boolean inGame)
      Sets the in-game status for this client.
      Parameters:
      inGame - the new in-game status

      public String getIp()
      Returns the server IP address.

      the server IP address

      public int getPort()
      Returns the server port.
      Returns:
      the server port

    • getNickname

      public String getNickname()
      Returns the nickname of this client.
      Returns:
      the nickname of this client

    • setNickname

      public void setNickname(String nickname)
      Sets the nickname for this client.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the new nickname to set

    • startConnection

      public abstract void startConnection() throws Exception
      Starts the connection to the server. Must be implemented by subclasses.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during connection

    • sendMessage

      public abstract void sendMessage(Message message) throws IOException
      Sends a message to the server. Must be implemented by subclasses.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to send
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs during message sending

    • disconnect

      public abstract void disconnect() throws Exception
      Disconnects from the server. Must be implemented by subclasses.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during disconnection

    • handleMessage

      public void handleMessage(Message message)
      Handles a message received from the server by executing it.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to handle

    • getClientID

      public int getClientID()
      Returns the client ID of this client.
      Returns:
      the client ID of this client

    • setClientID

      public void setClientID(int clientID)
      Sets the client ID for this client.
      Parameters:
      clientID - the new client ID to set

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns the connection status of this client.
      Returns:
      true if the client is connected, false otherwise

    • setConnected

      public void setConnected(boolean connected)
      Sets the connection status for this client.
      Parameters:
      connected - the new connection status to set
